subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-19 in Los Angeles
subcodes.first_line: …so that each of you may become a candle, literally a light of guidance, and a manifestor of power… You must be newly created. You must not be the same as you were before you became Bahá’ís. A transformation must take place.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @second birth, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @being a source of light; guidance, @fulfillment of true potential, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause
